reviews.comment:
Tiene dos islas de surtidores y solo hacen funcionar una . Filas larga de más de una hs para cargar . Es una verguenza

(Translated by Google)
It has two pump islands, but only one is operational. There are long lines, over an hour long, to fill up. It's a disgrace.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15516558717533724848/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNSaWYzZ2dBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Mucha cola ,para poner nafta se tarda mucho tiempo. Porque otras estaciones estaban cerradas cuando fui , lo demás todo okey

(Translated by Google)
There was a long line to get gas, and it took a very long time. Other stations were closed when I went, but everything else was fine.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15516558717533724848/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNSeXR1ZWlBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Demora para cargar combustibles.Pocos empleados para la demanda.

(Translated by Google)
Delays in refueling. Insufficient staff to meet demand.

The YPF stations at the border are unfortunately not well prepared for the high season.

reviews.comment:
Hermosa estación de servicio solo que el combustible está más caro ahí que en cualquier otra.

(Translated by Google)
Beautiful gas station, only the fuel is more expensive there than anywhere else.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15516558717533724848/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURoeWNfWi1RRRAB

reviews.comment:
La atención de los playeros muy bien aunque sería conveniente que agreguen al menos uno más para atender a todos.... Uno pasa minutos esperando a que comiencen a despachar y eso no porque no estén, sino porque no da abasto.

(Translated by Google)
The service from the beach attendants was very good, although it would be convenient if they added at least one more to serve everyone.... You spend minutes waiting for them to start serving, and that's not because they aren't there, but because they can't keep up.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15516558717533724848/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURoOW9fdmVREAE
